headline: Reassessing Fair Isaac (FICO) Valuation After A Sharp Pullback And Mixed Earnings Multiple Signals
summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) has drawn investor attention after a prolonged share price pullback, with the stock down about 48% over the past year and roughly 38% year to date. See our latest analysis for Fair Isaac. The recent 1 day share price return of 0.91% to US$1,013.83 comes after a much steeper 90 day share price decline of 34.38%. Meanwhile, the 5 year total shareholder return of 96.57% contrasts sharply with the 47.83% total shareholder return decline over the past year, suggesting momentum...
